name: Hydroscand
message: Hydroscand was established 1969 in Stockholm, Sweden, by Björn Holmström. The focus was, and still is, fluid connectors, hoses andfittings. High quality and reliable performance in a demanding environment was the primary focus.We are ready to upload more than 42GB data. There are lots of essential corporate documents such as: financial data (audit, payment details, invoices), detailed employees and customers information (passports, Personal identity numbers, emails, phones) confidential information, NDAs and other documents with detailed personalinformation.
